release_notes: WebUI Notification Center (WIP), Windows GPU compositing flicker fix, 6 notification pipeline bug fixes, and protobufjs security update.

changes.note: Fixed early-return on PackManager failure in deliver_background_notification.
Fixed _on_session_notify empty session_key condition; update check now broadcasts notification.
Agent responses now create and broadcast a notification after each reply.
Heartbeat always broadcasts to WebUI; cron notifies WebUI even on external delivery; empty LLM response fallback text.
Filter agent_response badge when user is focused on the same session tab.
Added --disable-gpu-compositing flag and explicit edgechromium gui to fix Windows screen flickering.
